scripts.build: pnpm exec prisma generate && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm exec prisma generate && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.prisma.json
scripts.test: pnpm exec prisma generate && pnpm exec prisma db push --skip-generate && node scripts/run-vitest.mjs
scripts.lint: pnpm exec prisma generate && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.prisma.json
